option.name: originalContent
option.value:
param( [string]$KeystorePath = "C:\\UNIVERSIDAD\\TDSE\\secure-webapp-architecture-aws\\backend\\certs\\securewebapp-local.p12", [string]$StorePassword = "changeit", [string]$Alias = "securewebapp-local", [string]$DnsName = "localhost", [int]$ValidityDays = 365 )
$certsDir = Split-Path -Parent $KeystorePath if (-not (Test-Path $certsDir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $certsDir -Force | Out-Null }
keytool -genkeypair ` -alias $Alias ` -keyalg RSA ` -keysize 2048 ` -storetype PKCS12 ` -keystore $KeystorePath ` -validity $ValidityDays ` -storepass $StorePassword ` -keypass $StorePassword ` -dname "CN=$DnsName, OU=TDSE, O=ECI, L=Bogota, S=Cundinamarca, C=CO"
Write-Host "Keystore created at: $KeystorePath" Write-Host "Set environment variables before running backend:" Write-Host "SSL_ENABLED=true" Write-Host "SSL_KEYSTORE_PATH=$KeystorePath" Write-Host "SSL_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD=$StorePassword" Write-Host "SSL_KEY_ALIAS=$Alias"

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# Frontend - Apache Web Server with HTTPS # Dockerfile para servir la aplicación web estática con HTTPS
FROM httpd:2.4-alpine
# Instalar herramientas necesarias RUN apk add --no-cache \ openssl \ bash \ ca-certificates
# Crear directorio para certificados RUN mkdir -p /etc/apache2/certs
# Generar certificado autofirmado RUN openssl req -x509 -nodes -days 365 -newkey rsa:2048 \ -keyout /etc/apache2/certs/server.key \ -out /etc/apache2/certs/server.crt \ -subj "/C=CO/ST=Bogota/L=Bogota/O=ECI/CN=localhost"
# Habilitar módulos SSL necesarios RUN sed -i \ -e 's/^#LoadModule ssl_module/LoadModule ssl_module/' \ -e 's/^#LoadModule rewrite_module/LoadModule rewrite_module/' \ -e 's/^#LoadModule proxy_module/LoadModule proxy_module/' \ -e 's/^#LoadModule proxy_http_module/LoadModule proxy_http_module/' \ -e 's/^#LoadModule deflate_module/LoadModule deflate_module/' \ -e 's/^#LoadModule headers_module/LoadModule headers_module/' \ /usr/local/apache2/conf/httpd.conf
# Copiar archivos estáticos de la aplicación COPY index.html /usr/local/apache2/htdocs/ COPY auth.js /usr/local/apache2/htdocs/ COPY style.css /usr/local/apache2/htdocs/
# Copiar configuración SSL personalizada COPY httpd-ssl.conf /usr/local/apache2/conf/extra/httpd-ssl.conf
# Incluir configuración SSL en el archivo principal RUN echo "Include conf/extra/httpd-ssl.conf" >> /usr/local/apache2/conf/httpd.conf
# Exponer puerto HTTPS EXPOSE 443 EXPOSE 80
# Health check HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \ CMD nc -zv localhost 443 || exit 1
# Iniciar Apache en foreground CMD ["httpd-foreground"]

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# SSL/TLS Configuration for Apache # Configuración de HTTPS para Apache con certificados autofirmados
<VirtualHost *:443> ServerName localhost ServerAlias localhost
# Directorio raíz de documentos DocumentRoot /var/www/html
# Enable SSL/TLS SSLEngine on
# Certificados SSL (autofirmados) SSLCertificateFile /etc/apache2/certs/server.crt SSLCertificateKeyFile /etc/apache2/certs/server.key
# SSL Protocol Configuration SSLProtocol -all +TLSv1.2 +TLSv1.3 SSLCipherSuite HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5:!3DES SSLHonorCipherOrder on
# HSTS - HTTP Strict Transport Security Header always set Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload"
# Seguridad headers Header always set X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" Header always set X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" Header always set X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" Header always set Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
# CORS Headers (para comunicación con backend) Header always set Access-Control-Allow-Origin "*" Header always set Access-Control-Allow-Methods "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS" Header always set Access-Control-Allow-Headers "Content-Type, Authorization"
# Proxy configuration para API backend ProxyRequests Off ProxyPreserveHost On
<Proxy *> Order allow,deny Allow from all </Proxy>
# Redirigir /api/* hacia el backend ProxyPass /api https://backend:5000/api ProxyPassReverse /api https://backend:5000/api
# Logging CustomLog ${APACHE_LOG_DIR}/access.log combined ErrorLog ${APACHE_LOG_DIR}/error.log
# Compression <IfModule mod_deflate.c> AddOutputFilterByType DEFLATE text/html text/plain text/xml AddOutputFilterByType DEFLATE text/css text/javascript AddOutputFilterByType DEFLATE application/javascript application/json </IfModule>
# Caching headers <FilesMatch "\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif|ico|css|js|svg|woff|woff2)$"> Header set Cache-Control "max-age=31536000, public" </FilesMatch>
# Rewrite rules para SPA (Single Page Application) <IfModule mod_rewrite.c> RewriteEngine On RewriteBase / RewriteRule ^index\.html$ - [L] RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-f RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-d RewriteRule . /index.html [L] </IfModule>
# Deshabilitar directory listing <Directory /var/www/html> Options -Indexes +FollowSymLinks AllowOverride All Require all granted </Directory> </VirtualHost>
# HTTP a HTTPS redirect <VirtualHost *:80> ServerName localhost ServerAlias localhost
# Redirigir todo HTTP a HTTPS RewriteEngine On RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off RewriteRule ^(.*)$ https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [L,R=301]
CustomLog ${APACHE_LOG_DIR}/access.log combined ErrorLog ${APACHE_LOG_DIR}/error.log </VirtualHost>
# Enable required modules <IfModule !mod_ssl.c> LoadModule ssl_module modules/mod_ssl.so </IfModule>
<IfModule !mod_rewrite.c> LoadModule rewrite_module modules/mod_rewrite.so </IfModule>
<IfModule !mod_proxy.c> LoadModule proxy_module modules/mod_proxy.so LoadModule proxy_http_module modules/mod_proxy_http.so LoadModule proxy_https_module modules/mod_proxy_https.so </IfModule>
<IfModule !mod_deflate.c> LoadModule deflate_module modules/mod_deflate.so </IfModule>
<IfModule !mod_headers.c> LoadModule headers_module modules/mod_headers.so </IfModule>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
